response.justification: Bogdan has solid breadth across ~20 years of software engineering and genuine entrepreneurial experience through GISCollective, but the role demands director-level AI strategy leadership with recognized expertise in AI and cloud platform development at scale. His AI involvement is recent, practical, and tooling-oriented (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) rather than strategic or foundational. There is no evidence of cloud architecture at platform scale, no advanced AI credentials, and no history of advising enterprise customers or influencing organizational AI direction — all of which are core to this position.
strengths: ~20 years of diverse engineering experience across web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Founder and long-term maintainer of GISCollective, demonstrating entrepreneurial drive and open-source community impact
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling in current role, plus a track record of knowledge-sharing through workshops and conference talks
concerns: AI expertise is recent and implementation-focused (MCP code generators, agentic tooling), not the deep, recognized AI strategy or platform leadership the role requires
No meaningful cloud platform experience at scale; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is incidental, not indicative of cloud strategy or architecture ownership

Career trajectory has not progressed beyond Senior/Staff IC titles, with no demonstrated principal or director-level influence, customer advisory experience, or cross-organizational technical leadership
